title: DatasourceTestRun
description: Canonical datasource-root test report (plans 362/365). Public success shape for POST /api/v1/validation/run (and async poll GET /validation/run/{testRunId}). runType=test|integration|e2e; CLI/docs may say test | test-integration | test-e2e; public JSON uses runType only. Includes validation layer (machine/explain), certificate snapshot, optional integration pipeline results, capability E2Es, debug by reference, plural audit refs, developer summaries. Forward-compatible: minor reportVersion bumps may add fields.

reportVersion.description: Semver-style contract version for this envelope. Policy: additive fields => minor bump within same major; removed/renamed fields => major bump. Route migrations must cite target reportVersion.

runType.description: Kind of run. Maps to CLI/commands: test=test, test-integration=integration, test-e2e=e2e. Do not use kebab strings inside runType.

status.description: Root rollup across validation, integration, certificate, and capabilities for this datasource run: ok | warn | fail | skipped.

reportCompleteness.description: How much of the report is populated: full=all sections populated for this runType; partial=in progress or degraded fill; minimal=async accept or early poll (use testRunId/runId to continue).

runId.description: Server-issued stable id for this logical report run (correlation).

testRunId.description: Compatibility id for async E2E polling (POST /validation/run with runType=e2e and asyncRun=true, then GET /validation/run/{testRunId}); may equal runId per implementation.

systemKey.description: External system key this datasource belongs to.

datasourceKey.description: External datasource key within the system.

certificateIssuance.description: Integration-certificate auto-issue outcome for this datasource scope (VALIDATION_AUTO_ISSUE_INTEGRATION_CERTIFICATE).

capabilities.description: Per-capability results; optional nested e2e object per item (see CapabilityResult). Capability discovery precedence (highest first): request.capabilities > datasource.capabilities > execution.cip.operations > openapi.operations. Custom operation keys are permitted; CIP/OpenAPI keys use canonical CRUD names where applicable.

datasourceSummaries.description: Optional per-datasource rollups when the underlying run evaluated multiple datasources (e.g. validationScope=externalSystem).

DatasourceSummary.description: Lightweight per-datasource rollup for system-scoped runs.

status.description: Datasource rollup: ok | warn | fail | skipped.

validationStatus.description: Validation layer rollup for this datasource.

ValidationLayerResult.description: Structural validation outcome and explain-oriented machine outputs (ICC/PDS/DTS-shaped metrics, certification machine payloads, issues). Separate from developer narrative under developer.*

status.description: Validation layer rollup: ok | warn | fail.

summary.description: Short human summary of validation outcome.

issues.description: Structured issues with optional codes, severity, and remediation hints.

dataReadiness.description: Normalized data readiness for downstream use.

metricsOutput.description: Explain-oriented metrics payload (e.g. ICC/PDS/DTS-shaped); align with ValidationRunService / engine—not CLI narrative.

certificationOutput.description: Explain-oriented certification payload from validation/certify path—machine layer; not developer executive copy.

IntegrationResult.description: Pipeline/integration layer (test-integration); ordered step outcomes—not per-capability E2E (see capabilities[].e2e).

status.description: Integration layer rollup: ok | warn | fail | skipped.

summary.description: Short human summary of the integration run.

stepResults.description: Ordered integration step outcomes (fetch, map, normalize, etc.).

IntegrationStepResult.description: Single step in an integration pipeline run.

success.description: Whether this step completed without failure.

order.description: Optional ordering index within the pipeline.

evidence.description: Structured evidence (timings, counts, IDs); shape is implementation-defined.

CertificateIssuanceResult.description: Structured result when the dataplane evaluates integration-certificate auto-issue (safe for clients and logs).

reasonCode.description: Stable machine code when status is skipped or failed.

systemKey.description: External system key for this issuance scope.

datasourceKey.description: Datasource key for this issuance scope.

CertificateResult.description: Certification layer for the datasource: tier, blockers, and optional capability coverage counts.

status.description: Whether certification passed at the reported level.

summary.description: Short human summary of certification outcome.

blockers.description: Issues preventing a higher tier or pass.

CapabilitySummary.description: Aggregate pass/fail counts across capabilities (e.g. for certificate coverage or dashboards).

CapabilityResult.description: Result for one capability or CIP operation key; may include E2E detail and dependency refs.

type.description: Class of capability: read | write | sync | custom.

permission.description: RBAC permission name when relevant to this capability.

status.description: Capability rollup: ok | warn | fail | skipped.

dependsOn.description: Upstream validation or integration dependencies for this capability.

E2EResult.description: End-to-end test outcome for a single capability or strategy. Optional debug and auditRefs point at trace material for this E2E slice.

supported.description: Whether E2E is supported for this capability in the current configuration.

strategy.description: E2E strategy used: read | writeRead | crudLifecycle | custom.

status.description: E2E rollup for this capability: ok | warn | fail | skipped.

steps.description: Ordered execution steps for this E2E run.

ExecutionStep.description: Single stage within an execution or E2E trace.

durationMs.description: Wall-clock duration for this step in milliseconds.

Issue.description: Structured issue or blocker (validation, certificate, or policy).

code.description: Stable code: DP-VAL-* (structural/config), DP-CIP-* (execution/CIP), DP-SEC-* (auth/RBAC/exposure), DP-CONN-* (REST/MCP/connectivity), DP-E2E-* (end-to-end live); warnings DP-*-Wnn. Mapped from engine errorCode in DatasourceTestRun builders.

Error.description: Compact error object for execution steps and debug traces.

Dependency.description: Reference to an upstream validation or integration dependency.

ref.description: Opaque reference to the dependent run or artifact.

DebugTrace.description: Debug material for the run. Prefer summaries and payloadRefs; embed large request/response bodies only when mode=raw and after redaction—deep trace remains on existing audit/trace APIs.

mode.description: Verbosity: summary | full | raw (raw may include redacted payloads).

executionIds.description: CIP execution ids tied to this debug slice (opaque correlation).

steps.description: Execution steps included in this trace.

errors.description: Errors collected during the traced run.

payloadRefs.description: Pointers to full payloads via audit/trace APIs when authorized.

e2eAsyncDebug.description: Async E2E poll: masked debug from run store (requestId, timing, stepDebug, firstRequestUrl, requestParams, …).

PayloadRef.description: Reference to stored or audit-linked payload; avoids bloating the report envelope.

ref.description: Opaque id or URL to retrieve via audit/trace APIs when authorized.

AuditRefs.description: Plural by design: one datasource-root run can fan out to multiple executions. Resolve traces via these refs—no parallel trace store.

traceRefs.description: URLs or opaque refs to execution trace endpoints.

DeveloperSummary.description: CLI-oriented narrative strings only; keep ICC/PDS/DTS and raw metrics in validation.metricsOutput / certificate / debug machine paths.
